physical_object: cylinder complex spectrum edge branch classifier

diagnosis.interpretation: Boundary weight alone over-labels skin-localized bulk states. The red edge branch is better captured by tracing the analytic chiral edge energies E_+=sin(kx)+i gamma and E_-=-sin(kx)-i gamma; right-eigenvector edge weight and non-Bloch bulk distance are diagnostics.
diagnosis.next_step: Promote EPS/PDF point-set extraction into a quantitative validation gate for red branch cardinality, marker placement, and pixel layout.
